Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 12 

209 = Per regulatory or other agreement. The provider cannot collect this amount from the patient. 
However, this amount may be billed to subsequent payer. Refund to patient if collected. (Use 
only with group code OA) 

210 = Payment adjusted because pre-certification/authorization not received in a timely fashion 

211 = National Drug Codes (NDC) not eligible -+for rebate, are not
